name: Easy Egg and Tomato Benedict
recipeInstructions:
1. Hold tomatoes at room temperature until fully ripe. Cut each tomato into 4 slices; set aside.
2. In a small saucepan, combine mayonnaise, milk, lemon juice, basil, and black pepper. Heat until hot; keep warm.
3. On each English muffin half, arrange a tomato slice. Sprinkle lightly with salt, top with a poached egg, and cover with the mayonnaise sauce.
4. Serve two for each portion. Garnish with parsley if desired. Serves 4.
